xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
CKEditor.ConfigClass_removePlugins=Eklentiler Devre Dışı CKEditor.ConfigClass_removePlugins.hint=Devre dışı bırakılan eklentilerin listesi. CKEditor.ConfigClass_removeButtons=Devre Dışı Bırakılan Araç Çubuğu Özellikleri CKEditor.ConfigClass_removeButtons.hint=Devre dışı bırakılan araç çubuğu özelliklerinin listesi. CKEditor.ConfigClass_linkShowAdvancedTab=Bağlantı: Gelişmiş Sekmeyi Göster CKEditor.ConfigClass_linkShowAdvancedTab.hint=Kimlik, ad, sınıf veya stil gibi bağlantı niteliklerini ayarlamanıza olanak tanır. CKEditor.ConfigClass_linkShowTargetTab=Bağlantı: Hedef Sekmesini Göster CKEditor.ConfigClass_linkShowTargetTab.hint=Bağlantı hedefi özniteliğini ayarlamanıza izin verir (ör. bağlantıyı yeni bir sekmede açmak için). CKEditor.ConfigClass_loadJavaScriptSkinExtensions=JavaScript Dış Görünüm Uzantılarını Yükle CKEditor.ConfigClass_loadJavaScriptSkinExtensions.hint=Some rendering macros are displayed using JavaScript code. Loading the JavaScript code improves the WYSIWYG aspect of the editor but it may cause problems if the JavaScript code interferes with the CKEditor code or if it changes content outside of the macro output boundaries. CKEditor.ConfigClass_advanced=Advanced Configuration CKEditor.ConfigClass_advanced.hint=You can write a JavaScript snippet to modify directly the configuration object. Check the {0}CKEditor documentation{1} for the list of available configuration properties. ckeditor.content.placeholder=Start typing here... ckeditor.admin.saveComment=Updated the CKEditor configuration from the Administration ckeditor.admin.reset=Reset ckeditor.admin.reset.hint=Restore the default configuration ckeditor.admin.reset.confirmation=Are you sure you want to restore the default configuration? All your changes will be lost. ckeditor.plugin.link.options=Options ckeditor.plugin.link.anchor=Anchor ckeditor.plugin.link.queryString=Query String ckeditor.plugin.link.defaultLabel=type the link label ckeditor.plugin.link.openInNewTab=Open Link in New Tab ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.link.upload= ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.link.uploadHint= ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.list.listType.none= ckeditor.plugin.macro.placeholder=macro:{0} ckeditor.plugin.macro.buttonHint=XWiki Macro ckeditor.plugin.macro.editButtonHint=Edit Macro ckeditor.plugin.macro.refreshFailed=Failed to refresh the edited content. ckeditor.plugin.macro.dedicatedInsertButtonHint=Insert {0} macro ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.macro.installPending= ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.macro.installSuccessful= ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.macro.installFailed= ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.title=Import Office File ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.filePath=File Path ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.filePath.hint=Choose the office file to import. The file will be uploaded and attached to this page and its content inserted in the content of the page. ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.filterStyles=Filter Styles ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.filterStyles.hint=Filter text styles like font, color, alignment, margins. Content structure including heading levels, paragraphs, lists and tables are preserved. ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.useOfficeViewer=Use the Office Viewer ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.useOfficeViewer.hint=Check this option if you don't plan to edit the content of the office file after the import or if you don't want to mix the content of the office file with the content that you are currently editing. ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.required=Required ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.import=Import ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.inProgress=Importing office file... ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.done=Office file successfully imported. ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.fail=Office import failed. ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.noUploadURL=File upload URL is not configured. ckeditor.plugin.office.importer.failedToLoadForm=Failed to load the form. ckeditor.plugin.resource.notSpecified=The {0} is not specified. ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.resource.selectValue= ckeditor.plugin.save.leaveConfirmationMessage=There are unsaved changes. Do you want to discard them? ckeditor.plugin.save.failed=The content cannot be saved because of a CKEditor internal error. You should try to copy your important changes and reload the editor. ckeditor.plugin.source.conversionFailed=Failed to perform the conversion. ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.selection.restoring= ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.table.header.accessibilityWarning= ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.basicStyles=Basic Styles ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.lists=Lists ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.bulletedlist=Bulleted List ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.numberedlist=Numbered List ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.insert=Insert ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.horizontalrule=Horizontal Line ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.specialchar=Special Character ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.infoBox=Info Box ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.successBox=Success Box ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.warningBox=Warning Box ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.errorBox=Error Box ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.toc=Table of Contents ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.include=Include ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.code=Code Snippet ckeditor.plugin.toolbar.otherMacros=Other Macros ckeditor.plugin.syntax.update.inProgress=Updating the WYSIWYG editor ckeditor.plugin.syntax.update.done=WYSIWYG editor updated ckeditor.plugin.syntax.update.failed=Failed to update the WYSIWYG editor ckeditor.plugin.syntax.wysiwygModeUnsupported=The WYSIWYG edit mode is not supported by the {0} syntax. ### Missing: ckeditor.plugin.icon.iconsFetchFailed= ### Missing:
